original_query: select sum(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 as avg_yearly from lineitem, part where p_partkey = l_partkey and p_brand = 'Brand#32' and p_container = 'MED PKG' and l_quantity < ( select 0.2 * avg(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = p_partkey );
rewritten_query:
WITH part_avg AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, 0.2 * AVG(l_quantity) AS avg_qty
    FROM lineitem
    GROUP BY l_partkey
)
SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice)/7.0 AS avg_yearly
FROM part
JOIN lineitem ON part.p_partkey = lineitem.l_partkey
JOIN part_avg ON part.p_partkey = part_avg.l_partkey
WHERE part.p_brand = 'Brand#32'
  AND part.p_container = 'MED PKG'
  AND lineitem.l_quantity < part_avg.avg_qty;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Eliminated the correlated subquery by precomputing the average quantity per part key in a CTE
Replaced multiple sequential scans on lineitem with a single scan and aggregation
Used explicit JOIN syntax instead of implicit joins in the FROM clause
